integrity_checks.name: verifier_agent_is_distinct_from_executor
integrity_checks.detail: Verifier agent must be distinct from the executing agent

integrity_checks.name: verifier_role_is_carried_by_verifier_agent
integrity_checks.detail: Verifier agent must carry the declared verifier role

integrity_checks.name: verifier_capabilities_are_required_by_verifier_role
integrity_checks.detail: Verifier role must require every declared verifier capability

integrity_checks.name: verifier_capabilities_are_carried_by_verifier_agent
integrity_checks.detail: Verifier agent must carry every declared verifier capability

integrity_checks.name: verifier_scope_matches_operational_delegate
integrity_checks.detail: Verifier authority scope must stay inside the declared operational delegation boundary

integrity_checks.name: proof_record_verified_by_resolved_verifier_agent
integrity_checks.detail: ProofRecord.verified_by must resolve to the declared verifier agent object

integrity_checks.name: proof_record_subject_matches_bundle_task
integrity_checks.detail: ProofRecord subject must resolve to the bundle task

integrity_checks.name: verifier_boundary_rules_forbid_execution
integrity_checks.detail: Verifier agent boundary rules must explicitly forbid task execution

boundary_rules: Must validate proof against the declared task and artifact chain.
Cannot execute the task it verifies.
